tiles.title: Assembly Munich Status 0=station ready to do work, 1=work in progress, 2=work done and good part manufactured, 3=work done and scrap manufactured, 4=station in fault state

query.text:
let tzOffset = toscalar(datetime_utc_to_local(now(), 'Europe/Berlin') - now());
(opcua_metadata_lkv
| where DataSetName contains "assembly"
| where DataSetName contains "munich"
| join kind=inner (opcua_telemetry
    | where Name == "Status"
    | where Timestamp > _startTime and Timestamp < _endTime
) on Subject
| extend NodeValue = toint(Value)
| project Timestamp1, NodeValue)
| union (ShiftBreak(_startTime, _endTime, 4, tzOffset))

opcua_metadata_lkv
| where DataSetName contains "assembly"
| where DataSetName contains "munich"
| join kind=inner (opcua_telemetry
    | where Name == "EnergyConsumption"
    | where Timestamp > _startTime and Timestamp < _endTime
) on Subject
| order by Timestamp1 desc
| make-series num=avg(todouble(Value)) on Timestamp1 from _startTime to _endTime step 1s 
| extend (anomalies, score, baseline) = series_decompose_anomalies(num, 0.5, -1, 'linefit')

let horizon = (_endTime - _startTime) / 2;
let dt = 1m;
opcua_metadata_lkv
| where DataSetName contains "packaging"
| where DataSetName contains "munich"
| join kind=inner (opcua_telemetry
    | where Name == "NumberOfManufacturedProducts"
    | where Timestamp > _startTime and Timestamp < _endTime
) on Subject
| order by Timestamp1 desc
| make-series actual=avg(toint(Value)) on Timestamp1 from _startTime to _endTime + horizon step dt
| extend forecast = series_decompose_forecast(actual, toint(horizon/dt))

let oee = CalculateOEEForStation("assembly", "munich", 6000, _startTime, _endTime);
print round(oee * 100, 2)

let oee = CalculateOEEForStation("test", "munich", 6000, _startTime, _endTime);
print round(oee * 100, 2)

let oee = CalculateOEEForStation("packaging", "munich", 6000, _startTime, _endTime);
print round(oee * 100, 2)

let averageEnergyConsumption = toscalar(
opcua_metadata_lkv
| where DataSetName contains "assembly"
| where DataSetName contains "munich"
| join kind=inner (opcua_telemetry
    | where Name == "EnergyConsumption"
    | where Timestamp > _startTime and Timestamp < _endTime
) on Subject
| extend energy = todouble(Value)
| summarize avg(energy));
print round(toscalar(averageEnergyConsumption) * 1000, 2)
print round(CalculateOEEForLine("munich", 6000, _startTime, _endTime) * 100, 2)

tiles.title: UNS / ISA-95 Graph
tiles.description: Unified Namespace (UNS) / ISA-95 asset hierarchy rendered as an interactive Plotly node-link graph. Requires the Python plugin on the database.

query.text:
let edges =
    opcua_metadata_lkv
    | project DisplayName, levels = pack_array(DisplayName, Workcell, Line, Area, Site, Enterprise)
    | mv-apply with_itemindex = i level = levels to typeof(string) on (
        where isnotempty(level)
        | sort by i asc
        | extend source = level, target = next(level)
        | where isnotempty(target)
        | project source, target
    )
    | distinct source, target;
let depths =
    opcua_metadata_lkv
    | project levels = pack_array(Enterprise, Site, Area, Line, Workcell, DisplayName)
    | mv-apply with_itemindex = d level = levels to typeof(string) on (
        where isnotempty(level)
        | project id = level, depth = d
    )
    | summarize depth = min(depth) by id;
let nodes =
    edges
    | project id = source
    | union (edges | project id = target)
    | distinct id
    | join kind=leftouter depths on id
    | project id, depth = coalesce(depth, 0);
let graphData =
    (edges | extend rowType = "E", id = "", depth = 0)
    | union (nodes | extend rowType = "V", source = "", target = "");
let pythonCode = ```
import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import networkx as nx

edges_df = df[df['rowType'] == 'E']
nodes_df = df[df['rowType'] == 'V']

G = nx.DiGraph()
for _, r in nodes_df.iterrows():
    G.add_node(str(r['id']), subset=int(r['depth']))
for _, r in edges_df.iterrows():
    s = str(r['source']); t = str(r['target'])
    if s not in G: G.add_node(s, subset=0)
    if t not in G: G.add_node(t, subset=0)
    G.add_edge(s, t)

depths = nx.get_node_attributes(G, 'subset')
maxd = max(depths.values()) if depths else 0
pos = nx.multipartite_layout(G, subset_key='subset', align='horizontal')
pos = {n: (xy[0], float(maxd - depths.get(n, 0))) for n, xy in pos.items()}

edge_x = []; edge_y = []
for s, t in G.edges():
    x0, y0 = pos[s]; x1, y1 = pos[t]
    edge_x += [x0, x1, None]; edge_y += [y0, y1, None]
edge_trace = go.Scatter(x=edge_x, y=edge_y, mode='lines', line=dict(width=1, color='#888'), hoverinfo='none')

node_x = []; node_y = []; node_text = []; node_color = []
for n in G.nodes():
    x, y = pos[n]; node_x.append(x); node_y.append(y)
    node_text.append(n); node_color.append(depths.get(n, 0))
node_trace = go.Scatter(x=node_x, y=node_y, mode='markers+text', text=node_text, textposition='top center', hoverinfo='text', marker=dict(size=16, color=node_color, colorscale='Viridis', line=dict(width=1, color='#333')))

fig = go.Figure(data=[edge_trace, node_trace], layout=go.Layout(title='UNS / ISA-95 asset hierarchy', showlegend=False, hovermode='closest', margin=dict(b=20, l=5, r=5, t=40), xaxis=dict(showgrid=False, zeroline=False, showticklabels=False), yaxis=dict(showgrid=False, zeroline=False, showticklabels=False)))
result = pd.DataFrame(data=[fig.to_json()], columns=['plotly'])
```;
graphData
| evaluate python(typeof(plotly:string), pythonCode)
| render plotly

opcua_metadata_lkv
| where DataSetName contains "assembly"
| where DataSetName contains "seattle"
| join kind=inner (opcua_telemetry
    | where Name == "Pressure"
    | where Timestamp > _startTime and Timestamp < _endTime
) on Subject
| extend NodeValue = toint(Value)
| project Timestamp1, NodeValue

| where DataSetName contains "assembly"
| where DataSetName contains "munich"
| join kind=inner (opcua_telemetry

    | where Timestamp > _startTime and Timestamp < _endTime
) on Subject
| extend NodeValue = todouble(Value)
| project Timestamp1, NodeValue)
| union (ShiftBreak(_startTime, _endTime, 6000, tzOffset))
